feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can somene help me how to deactivate SAP GTS to the PO,I am not able to post GR/GI
entry.content:
Hi GTS Consultants,

I tried creating PO in training server ,But when I save I got error in ME21N screen - legal control custs prod. mast. required,Ican save the PO with blocked status, but when I try to post Goods Receipt system is not allowing me to post and giving below message -

Customs document 4500000375 is technical incomplete (SAP GTS)

Message No. /SAPSLL/PLUGINR3076

Please let me know where to deactivate SAP GTS to my PO Document type or my Comp Code/Plant or at client level.

@Lakshmipathi Any inputs on this ?

entry.title: Rounding profile: by using the grid the functionality seems not working
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

 

using di Rounding profile on products we have an issue and the system seems not working. The system is I-RS and so inserting the generic article and quantity the system displays the characteristics grid (size and color) and we can insert the quantities to be exploded in the Variant articles. After the setup of rounding profile, if we insert directly the variant article in the sales order, the system works correctly and apply the rounding but by using the grid the system doesn’t do anything and the functionality seems not working at all even after the explosion of all variants.

entry.title: Reminder for Import Certificate
entry.content:
Hello All,

Due to the new tariffs imposed by the US on EU countries, every time a European sales organization creates a sales order for materials listed and where the recipient is a sales organization in the US, a pop-up (reminder) about attaching the import certificate should appear.

I have a list of approximately 500 materials for which, when creating a sales order with a recipient plant in the US, a message must appear indicating the necessity to attach the import certificate.

Do you have any suggestions which solution may I use for that?

Thank you in advance for your support.
BR

entry.title: doubts with table USR40
entry.content:
Greetings, dear friends
I have a question: If wildcards are added to the USR40 table, would they directly impact existing users in the system? For example,
if an existing user has a password with the newly added wildcards, would they be forced to change their password?
Thank you.

entry.title: Auto Invoice when GRN ic created in sap
entry.content:
Hello Experts !!!

In PO GR-Bsd IV & ERS is ticked. When GRN is created user need to auto invoicing.

Please assist to complete the process.

 

Regards-

Rajib

entry.title: Period distribution not defined for fiscal year variant Z1 Message No. ACC_AA080in AS01
entry.content: When I try to create an asset in AS01 I get the error, Period distribution not defined for fiscal year variant Z1 Message No. ACC_AA080, does anyone have an idea how to resolve this?

entry.title: Catch weight quantity wrongly getting determined in outbound
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one issue in which the material the Catch weight material but whenever I'm creating and outbound from STO the parallel unit of measure (CW) is getting calculated from material master 1CW = 480 KG but the actual CW quantity in MMBE is 420 KG (Actual HU Qty), previously it was correctly getting picked as per the quantity in MMBE. But now something happened it's calculating from master data and due to this the queues are getting stuck with error "valuation quantity becomes negative" due to less catch weight at S4.

Please suggest what need to be done in this case.

Thanks,

Vinod.

entry.title: Can I add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Please suggest, how to add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in SAP S/4HANA 2023?

or let me know if it is feasible in SAP S/4HANA 2023?

as per my knowledge Fiori approach, the recommended and upgrade-safe method to add a custom tab or fields to the WBS Element (CJ93 equivalent) is through In-App

Extensibility using the "Custom Fields and Logic "Fiori app.

For GUI Screen, Classical enhancement like CNEX007 is still required.

and in the Enhancement CNEX007. FM - EXIT_SAPLCJWB_001 is not available in the S/4HANA 2023.

Also, I have checked the program behind CJ92 is SAPLCJSS. but couldn't find screen exists.

I have attached the screen short and marked with yellow box where need to add custom tab with custom fields. Please suggest the solution. 

Thanks,

Priyanka Soni

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content: This is new to me. I'm calling this RFC via vb.net for a 'goods issue to a reservation', it returns a material doc and year but the transaction commit does not seem to work. The 'create' returns a doc and year but 'commit' returns blank. It does not get posted. Is this because each call is actually a different LUW and it needs to be the same luw?

entry.title: Inconsistent data between table KBLP and COOI and FMIOI
entry.content:
Please find attached document having screen shots of below mentioned issue we have in our production PS1, Integration QST and QS1 UAT  system. Attached screen shots is from our QST system and it is where first we need a fix before fix in Production

Issue:

We have found some inconsistency between EARMARKED FUNDS (Funds Commitment) table KBLP and  FM commitment documents FMIOI and CO commitment line item table COOI. 

REFX contract 1271/4521776 assigned to funds commitment 7000033525 and you can see in attached document point 4 where REFX contract look ok. The issue is when we see funds commitment 7000033525 via FMZ3 it shows two line item which is also validated via REFX contract as well as in table KBLP. 

However when we run KSB2 commitment item report for cost centers it shows 5 line items in which item item 1 is ok, item 2 has incorrect amount and item 3, 4 and 5 is showing which not exist in FMZ3 and KBLP. 

KSB2 retrieved commitments amount from table COOI which is commitment details table and this table also contain 5 line items with 3 , 4 and 5 not exist in FMZ3

Also FM commitment document table FMIOI is showing 5 items where as item 1 and 2 are correct and 3, 4 and 5 is in this table however they are not in FMZ3 or in KBLP

Following Requests from SAP:

  1. How can we delete or removed incorrect entries from COOI and FMIOI to make sure our free balance reports , KSB2 and all reports showing only two items exactly the way we seeing in tale KBLP and via FMZ3
  2. Also if SAP can highlight what would be the potential causes which have this inconsistency. 

 

As this is just example of one contract and funds commitments however we have issue in multiple contracts and funds commitment so we highly appreciate if SAP can pinpoint some program, OSS note or any fix which delete those inconsistent document for our commitment reports.

entry.title: How to input different GI date in 1 delivery note number
entry.content:
Hi,

I'd like to input different GI date for 1 dn number.

for example for 1 DN, there's 6 item lines and I want to put 2025-04-09 gi date for 10~30 line items and 04-10  gi date for 40~60 line items.

Is it possible to input the different gi date or do I need to create seperate DN?

Thank you,

entry.title: Change the inspection stock of material XXXXXXX in QM only
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In our project, we need to use QM stock and make adjustments using MIGO. We created new movement types "ZXX" by copying the standard movement types in the 7XX series.

Movement type: ZAA (Inventory Increase (Inspection Stock)) - copied from 703
Movement type: ZAB (Inventory Decrease (Inspection Stock)) - copied from 704

However, we are encountering the error "Change the inspection stock of material XXXXXXX in QM only" and are unable to proceed with MIGO. Could you please provide detailed guidance on how to perform this operation using MIGO?

We have tried the following SAP note, but it did not resolve the issue:
https://me.sap.com/notes/193192

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Delivery days of the week by Suppliers
entry.content:
Dear All

I have the below requirement:

A Material X is delivered by Supplier A and B.

Supplier A delivers every Monday and Thursday.
Supplier B delivers every Wednesday.


Lotsize=PK can be set by Materials, but not by suppliers. Would you have any idea to resolve this situation by SAP Standard setting?

Regards,

entry.title: Report S_PL0_86000030 showing incorrect values
entry.content: All the GLs in the report S_PL0_86000030 is showing same values. What is the issue

entry.title: Error E:EDOCUMENT_MY:017 when posting DEBMAS idocs
entry.content:
Hello,

We recently migrated to SAP EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 (yes we are late). Now a lot of DEBMAS idocs that previously where processed without any problem, are ending now with error E:EDOCUMENT_MY:017 Message no. EDOCUMENT_MY017

When I afterwards process the DEBMAS idoc via the Workspace, it only processes the idoc when I choose foreground by pressing Enter when the error occurs. In background it doesn't process.

When I process from workspace with option Process Foreground from error, then it stops at Taxes Sales Area. showing Country NL, Tax category MWST, Output Tax, Tax classification 1, Liable for taxes. When pressing Save, it saves the customer after prompting the OK-Code =AO01. 

Related with this error, I found some posts online about table EDOCOMPLAT eDocument: Communication Platform OBSOLETE. This table is empty, I don't know if it was filled before. Seems like this is Obsolete (now)!?

Any suggestions? Thanks.

entry.title: VK11 automatic calculation of an alternative unit of measure
entry.content: Hi colleagues, in transaction vk11 user can create separately manually sales price for item per piece and per package C0*, for all alternative units of measurement that are entered for this item in master data. But it is necessary to make an automatic calculation of the price per alternative unit of measure when the price per piece is saved. This should happen exactly in the process of price creation. I can"t find a standard SAP solution. Perhaps this should be done via a formula (TA VOFM) and add this formula to the access sequence. But maybe there are other options that I would like to ask you about. Thank you in advance

entry.title: AUC partial capitalization not completely using prior year acquisition first
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues, 

We are partially capitalizing assets on ECC 6.0 and auditors have requested an explanation as to why SAP splits the capitalization into current and prior year "streams" with transaction types 331, 336 (asset shell) 338 and 339 (AUC asset). In particular, why the system does not use all of the prior year acquisition values first, before using the current year acquisitions, even if the prior year acquisitions are sufficient to cover the total capitalization value. 

The image below shows the AUC acquisitions in 22/23 of 4,511,271.95.

In 23/24, further acquisitions of 2,313,975.22 was settled to the AUC asset.

When a partial capitalization of 3,453,275.80 was done in 23/24, the value was split into 1,170,770 current year acquisition and 2,282,505.80 prior year acquisition.

Instead of decreasing the prior year (22/23) acquisition value of 4,511,271.95 down to 1,057,996.15. 

From what I can determine, SAP used the total acquisitions for current and prior year: 6,825,247.17 and calculated the % of prior and current acquisitions to the acquisition total. And then applied this percentage during the capitalization process. 66% to 34%. 

Is it SAP standard or best business practice to calculate this split in such a manner? Or is this a configurable calculation. If so, which table or transaction code can be used to view, amend and/or substantiate this calculation?

The assistance would be much appreciated. 

Kind Regards,

Vaughan

AUC transaction detail

entry.title: Value of custom fields not shown in list FAGLB03
entry.content:
Hello,

Since our upgrade we have an issue in showing the values of 2 custom fields in the view of transaction FAGLB03.

The columns are shown, but the values are not displayed. I are just emtpy fields. By double clicking on a line, the details are shown, there the values are shown correctly.

The custom fields are included in FAGLPOSX.

How can I fix this issue? Thanks!

entry.title: IP10 Maintenance schedule plan process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently facing issue in IP10 transaction while scheduling maintenance plans. 
When the start date of call is in previous year, we could see system is creating calls from previous year. But the calls are getting creted based on scheduling period and it is taking current year as basis and scheduling calls.
This is causing calls scheduled even after End date of scheduling as calls are getting started from current year.

For example, 

For below we could see calls are scheduled form 2023 to 2028. But as scheduling period is 3YR, system is considering current year 2025 3 which is till 2028 to schedule calls.

Call Horizon      : 30 Day
Scheduling period : 3 YR
Cycle             : 12 MO and 6 MO
Start of cycle    : 01.01.2023
End date for sch. : 31.12.2030
Strategy          : FTMA05

In the below case, we could see calls are scheduled form 2023 to 2031. But as scheduling period is 6YR, system is considering current year 2025 6 which is till 2031 to schedule calls. But as end date of scheduling is 2031, business are expecting no calls after 2030 (end date of scheduling). 

Call Horizon      : 30 Day
Scheduling period : 6 YR
Cycle             : 12 MO and 6 MO
Start of cycle    : 01.01.2023
End date for sch. : 31.12.2030
Strategy          : FTMA05

Please let us know if the above is standard behavior. If yes, We need your inputs on how to setup the calls to consider the start of cycle date (not the current date) and  to stop the calls at the end date of scheduling.

entry.title: SUM:MAIN_NEWBAS/JOB_RSUPGCUA_PROD failed
entry.content:
Using SUM to upgrade ECC 6.0, I got this error message:  

This is a Clone Environment 

The execution percentage is 74%

{ 

Checks after phase MAIN_NEWBAS/JOB_RSUPGCUA_PROD were negative!

Last error code set: 

RFC system <SID> nr 01 function "SUBST_START_BATCHJOB" 

RFC failed with code 3 key SYNTAX_ERROR: 

Syntax error in program SAPLSVAR } 

Does any one have any idea?
